anyOf.description: Copy the value at the wire JSON Pointer `from` to the canonical field `to`.
Assign the literal `value` to the canonical field `to` (no wire read).
Copy the value at `from`, coercing a numeric string to a number (a common wire→canonical normalization).

description: How a single canonical field is produced from the decoded wire message — the closed, **pure** op set of the Message-Translator (doc 05 §2).
